title: Seat Subsystem Dynamic Attributes
description: Dynamic attributes of the seat, defining seat position, signal transmission targets, etc.

definition.description: Resource location of the subsystem model, pointing to the corresponding subsystem static attribute definition file.

locator.description: Seat point locator name, bones in the model will serve as seat position. If empty, use the default locator defined by the subsystem.

control_group_preset.description: Resource location of the control group preset, defining the available control channel mappings for this seat. e.g. machine_max:default_driver.

passenger_num_outputs.description: Passenger count signal output channel and targets.
